license_terms: The AICPA Trust Services Criteria are published and copyrighted by the AICPA. Criterion text is not bundled with ControlBridge. Download the free PDF from AICPA (link in license_url) and use `controlbridge catalog import` to load a local copy, or supply your own service-organization-specific criteria mapping. ControlBridge ships only the public category and criterion numbering (CC1-CC9, A1, C1, P1-P8, PI1).
